e5be75e","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ab92e9e1cb08144c43fa3a383a87c48f49a652d51156950b928c2a50bee6b3a5","dweb:/ipfs/QmWeKkKZBgLDKgRFGKCzsKybYF7C8g9ysg5kU1b1p7QFBi"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]},"src/HMACGuardedUUPS.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcd3c8dd1cf954356e40730378dad6d5353ad64a075d5c1b8479d82033010f1e3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f753d1b0348f2fe84c4af6bb2b6e1cdd6eaf8482b7bc509dfc2b22c680e524d7","dweb:/ipfs/QmPZt7XXHZCy4CY8onqAfsUNegZsHLMsZGtm6ucdn8bfkj"]},"src/HMACLib.sol":{"keccak256":"0xbb8953ca232e0be57daa48c8751b62a93b0d1927c65bb816ca8dc2e0466c8289","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://058a140625c2a21d895836868c2ca093c7c4dd43d8b0e763f8a063cd78c45545","dweb:/ipfs/QmQGoMpTth6P9aewK3nVdsvABYMimqsQtprxxNc4hM5SXf"]},"src/MockProtectedVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf3b61da185b07aa3fbb7e04fb45f3dd6774412c79d65bfae5b776bfd827ea352","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1ff7f7b9213bb92133d4f635807c3143cfead81a72f46f132f072b6cb8ae1c3c","dweb:/ipfs/QmcreMhnGxYpatkmq8MqJmgZXHzgWQyxueCdBtDAFayQ53"]}},"version":1}

constructor.details: Per OZ upgradeable pattern: the implementation must not be      initializable; only the proxy's storage can be initialized.

params.initialCommitment: The terminal value `S_N` of the hash chain.
params.initialOwner: The address that owns the vault.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

upgradeToAndCallAuth(address,bytes,bytes.details: The HMAC of the binding parameters, computed using `preimage` as the      key, must match the low 16 bits of the transaction's effective      priority fee (`tx.gasprice - block.basefee`).      The signing service is responsible for setting `maxPriorityFeePerGas`      such that its low 16 bits equal `HMAC(preimage, binding) & 0xFFFF`,      and for setting `maxFeePerGas` high enough that the priority fee is      not capped (recommended: `maxFeePerGas >= 2 * basefee + maxPriorityFeePerGas`).

params.data: The initialization calldata to invoke on the new implementation,        or empty bytes if no initialization is needed.
params.newImplementation: The new implementation address to upgrade to.
params.preimage: The next hash chain preimage. Must satisfy        `sha256(preimage) == currentCommitment`.

version().details: V1 returns 1. Upgraded versions will return higher numbers.

constructor.notice: Disable initializers on the implementation contract.

deposit(uint256).notice: Test deposit function — just updates a balance counter.

initialize(bytes32,address).notice: Initialize the vault. Called once during proxy deployment.

upgradeToAndCallAuth(address,bytes,bytes.notice: Authenticated upgrade entry point. The only valid way to upgrade         a contract that inherits HMACGuardedUUPS.

version().notice: Marker for tracking which version is currently active.
